note: Verified listings for Boulder Creek Local. Inclusion is not endorsement. Corrections: bouldercreeklocal.com/submit

listings.name: Butter Late Than Never Baking Co.
listings.description: Licensed Boulder Creek cottage bakery selling small-batch baked goods, custom orders, and wholesale orders.

listings.name: Wildstone Bakery
listings.description: Boulder Creek bakery producing naturally fermented breads, bagels, pastries, and seasonal tarts for regional farmers markets.
listings.hours_text: Downtown Santa Cruz Farmers Market Wednesdays 12:30-5:00 p.m.; Ben Lomond Village Market first Saturdays June-October 2026, 10:00 a.m.-2:00 p.m.
listings.service_area: Boulder Creek base; Santa Cruz and Ben Lomond farmers markets

listings.name: Big Basin Vineyards Estate Vineyard & Tasting Room
listings.description: Estate winery offering weekend wine tastings at its Boulder Creek vineyard.
listings.service_area: Boulder Creek and Santa Cruz Mountains visitors

listings.name: Johnnie's Super Market & Liquor
listings.description: Independent grocery with produce, meat, seafood, bakery, cheese, beer, wine, and spirits, plus a deli counter making fresh sandwiches daily.
listings.hours_text: Monday-Thursday 8:00 a.m.-9:00 p.m.; Friday-Saturday 8:00 a.m.-10:00 p.m.; Sunday 8:00 a.m.-9:00 p.m.

listings.name: Wild Roots Market - Boulder Creek
listings.description: Locally owned grocery with produce, meat, seafood, deli, bakery, and prepared foods.

listings.name: El Rey Leon
listings.description: Mexican restaurant offering counter service and online ordering.

listings.name: Red Pearl Chinese Cuisine
listings.description: Chinese restaurant preparing dine-in and takeout meals in downtown Boulder Creek.

listings.name: Scopazzi's Restaurant & Lounge
listings.description: Historic Italian restaurant with a lounge, brunch, takeout, and private-event rooms.
listings.hours_text: Breakfast Wednesday-Sunday 10:30 a.m.-2:00 p.m.; lunch Wednesday-Saturday 11:30 a.m.-3:00 p.m.; dinner Wednesday-Sunday 4:00 p.m.-closing; Monday-Tuesday closed.

listings.name: Tae's Edo Sushi Bar
listings.description: Japanese restaurant serving sushi and other Japanese dishes for dinner and limited lunch service.
listings.hours_text: Tuesday-Thursday and Sunday 4:00-8:00 p.m.; Friday-Saturday 12:00-3:00 p.m. and 4:00-8:00 p.m.; Monday closed.

listings.name: The Sawmill Restaurant & Alehouse
listings.description: American restaurant serving burgers, pub fare, and craft beer, with outdoor seating and a music stage.

listings.name: River Dogs of Boulder Creek
listings.description: Outdoor food stand serving hot dogs and sausages, including vegetarian options, with occasional live music.
listings.hours_text: Winter: Tuesday-Thursday 11:30 a.m.-3:00 p.m.; Friday-Sunday 11:30 a.m.-5:00 p.m.; weather and event closures possible.

listings.name: Bella's Cafe
listings.description: A locally owned American breakfast and lunch cafe in downtown Boulder Creek.

listings.name: Jenna Sue's Cafe
listings.description: A Boulder Creek coffee shop and cafe serving espresso drinks, breakfast, sandwiches, and house-baked goods.
listings.hours_text: Monday to Friday 6:00 AM to 2:30 PM, Saturday and Sunday 7:00 AM to 2:30 PM

listings.name: The Tree House Cafe
listings.description: A cafe and espresso bar at the edge of Boulder Creek with giant redwoods growing through the interior.

listings.name: Taqueria Los Gallos
listings.description: A Mexican taqueria in downtown Boulder Creek serving tacos, burritos, and other Mexican dishes.

listings.name: Redwood Keg Liquor & Deli
listings.description: A Boulder Creek bottle shop and deli known for wood-smoked tri-tip sandwiches, Korean barbecue, and a selection of beer, wine, and liquor.
